title: publish-episode client_payload
description: Schema for the client_payload of the publish-episode repository_dispatch event. The full dispatch body is {"event_type": "publish-episode", "client_payload": <this object>}.

series_id.description: ID of an existing podcast series, assigned by the podcast admin. Never auto-created.

external_id.description: Consumer's stable ID for this newsletter issue. Idempotency key: re-sending the same (series_id, external_id) updates the episode instead of duplicating it.

title.description: Episode title. Plain text, no HTML.

summary.description: Episode description shown in podcast players. Plain text.

publish_date.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone. Future dates do not schedule; the episode publishes on ingest.

audio_url.description: Publicly fetchable HTTPS URL of the MP3 at call time. MP3 only; CBR 96-128 kbps 44.1 kHz preferred (off-spec files are re-encoded by the pipeline).

transcript_url.description: Optional. Publicly fetchable HTTPS URL of the transcript. VTT preferred; SRT or plain text accepted.

source_text_url.description: Optional. Publicly fetchable HTTPS URL of the newsletter body (Markdown or HTML). Becomes show notes; HTML is sanitized.

auto_publish.description: true = publish immediately; false = ingest as draft for manual publish in the admin UI.
